title: Create: Chaos
description: A create based modpack with a bunch of addons, space travel, and guns to make life more chaotic.
body:
# Caution 
This modpack is still in alpha and stuff can change a lot between versions

# About
Create: Chaos is designed to give you the capability to completely take over your world and cause lots of chaos with your friends including:
- Jetpacks to revolutionize your movement options
- Factories to make almost every single item automatically (including but not limited to totems of undying)
- Powerful guns to make sure you are never challanged by another mob again
- Aircraft to quickly travel great distances
- Many new planets to explore and or conquer
- And the ability to make nuclear reactors to power all of your escapades because why not? 
- A series of quests to guide you along your journey of chaos

In your contintued quest for chaos vaious Qualitiy of Life mods have been added like a minimap, many optimization mods, recipe viewers, zoom, and even shaders to make those explosions look that much better.

# Future plans
Quests for Create, all the addons and TACZ.
Currently done for Immersive Aircraft, and partially done for Ad Astra
